input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.4
            TITLE: frame members or existing components that exceed the scatter shield material requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.4: Frame Members or existing components that exceed the scatter shield material requirements
T.5.2.4 Frame Members or existing components that exceed the scatter shield material requirements 
may be used as part of the shield.

final_answer: Frame Members or existing components that exceed the scatter shield material requirements may be used as part of the shield.
